title: Beef Zanzibari Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish with marinated beef, Zanzibari peppers, and savory flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from wok and set aside.
In the same wok, add remaining 1 tbsp of vegetable oil. Add garlic, ginger, and onion. Cook until the onion is translucent.
Add Zanzibari peppers and cook for 1 minute.
Add soy sauce and savory. Stir to combine.
Return beef to the wok. Stir to combine with sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the beef is cooked through.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
